name: pm-prioritization-tool
description: Product Management Prioritization Tool (RICE, MoSCoW, financial frameworks) with browser cache and optional MongoDB on Vercel.

scripts.build: node scripts/sync-asset-versions.js && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); if(!fs.existsSync('index.html')) throw new Error('missing index.html'); if(!fs.existsSync('api/state.js')) throw new Error('missing api/state.js'); console.log('OK: static root + api/ ready for Vercel');"
scripts.test: npm run test:storage && npm run test:metadata && npm run test:persistence && npm run test:export && npm run test:byok && npm run test:byok-validate && npm run test:kano && npm run test:llm && npm run test:5why && npm run test:periods && npm run test:gantt && npm run test:share && npm run test:workspace-merge && npm run test:api-dedupe && npm run test:import-tombstones && npm run test:import-file-kind && npm run test:incomplete-filter
